name: Task dossier and subtask hierarchy architecture
definitionOfDone: AMCore defines total-control tasks as execution dossiers, not flat to-do rows
The task database has a self-relation field named 母任務
The task database exposes the reciprocal self-relation field named 子任務
Parent task completion is gated by child task closure or explicit cancellation/transfer
Task pages preserve conversation, file, meeting, and report evidence in the body
Project manifests and upgrade records are updated without copying project data into AMCore
